# claudeadmin_invite (Data Source)

Fetches a single Anthropic invite by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeadmin_invite" "pending_alice" {
  id = "invite_015gWxCN9Hfg2QhZwTK7Mdeu"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `email` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `invited_at` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `status` (String)
